g.title: acq.invoice:payment_method->acq.invoice_payment_method:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (payment_method) REFERENCES acq.invoice_payment_method(code) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.invoice:closed_by->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (closed_by) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.invoice_entry:invoice->acq.invoice:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (invoice) REFERENCES acq.invoice(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: acq.invoice_item:invoice->acq.invoice:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (invoice) REFERENCES acq.invoice(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE
